name: Web Scraper
description: Fetch and extract content from web pages

skill.name: web_scraper
skill.description: Fetch and extract content from web pages
skill.system_prompt: You have access to web scraping tools. Use fetch_page to retrieve page content and extract_links to get all links from a page. Respect robots.txt and rate limits.

tools.name: fetch_page
tools.description: Fetch the text content of a web page

tools.name: extract_links
tools.description: Extract all links from a web page
